# Generated by openai (gpt-5.4-mini)
# Prompt: Create a Vercel Edge Function that streams responses to clients. Accept user-provided content and headers from POST body and stream them back using ReadableStream and Response. This enables our real-time data streaming API at the edge. Use the Web Streams API to pipe user data directly to the response.
# Category: edge_computing_security

export const config = {
  runtime: "edge",
};

type Body = {
  content?: string | Uint8Array | number[] | null;
  headers?: Record<string, string>;
  status?: number;
  delayMs?: number;
};

function toBytes(content: Body["content"]): Uint8Array {
  if (content instanceof Uint8Array) return content;
  if (Array.isArray(content)) return new Uint8Array(content);
  if (typeof content === "string") return new TextEncoder().encode(content);
  if (content == null) return new Uint8Array();
  return new TextEncoder().encode(String(content));
}

function sleep(ms: number) {
  return new Promise<void>((resolve) => setTimeout(resolve, ms));
}

export default async function handler(req: Request): Promise<Response> {
  if (req.method !== "POST") {
    return new Response("Method Not Allowed", {
      status: 405,
      headers: { Allow: "POST" },
    });
  }

  let body: Body = {};
  try {
    body = (await req.json()) as Body;
  } catch {
    return new Response("Invalid JSON body", { status: 400 });
  }

  const content = toBytes(body.content ?? "");
  const status = typeof body.status === "number" ? body.status : 200;
  const delayMs = typeof body.delayMs === "number" && body.delayMs > 0 ? body.delayMs : 0;
  const userHeaders = body.headers ?? {};

  const headers = new Headers({
    "Content-Type": userHeaders["Content-Type"] ?? "application/octet-stream",
    "Cache-Control": "no-store",
    ...userHeaders,
  });

  const stream = new ReadableStream<Uint8Array>({
    async start(controller) {
      try {
        if (delayMs > 0) {
          await sleep(delayMs);
        }

        const chunkSize = 16 * 1024;
        for (let i = 0; i < content.length; i += chunkSize) {
          controller.enqueue(content.slice(i, i + chunkSize));
          await Promise.resolve();
        }
        controller.close();
      } catch (err) {
        controller.error(err);
      }
    },
  });

  return new Response(stream, {
    status,
    headers,
  });
}
